ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-25-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/26/10 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 7/23/10 @ 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 603. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO WITH THE FOLLOWING SCHEDULE: THE LAST DAY TO HEAR MOTIONS IS 7/22/10 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, MOTIONS TO BE EFILED BY 7/7/10 WITH NO ADDITIONAL DAYS FOR ESERVICE, OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 7/14/10, AND REPLY IS DUE BY 7/19/10. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 6/15/10. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL RELY ON PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 6/29/10. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
